name: Mediterranean Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip the skin off the chicken.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients except the melted butter in a bowl.
3. Dip each piece of chicken into the melted butter, then coat evenly with the crumb mixture.
4. Arrange the chicken pieces so they don't touch in a large, shallow baking dish that has been greased with butter.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees Fahrenheit) until the chicken is tender, which should take about 1 hour.
6. Trim any excess parsley before serving.
